overview: Lava Slime is a Normal-class Ooze/Beast monster found in Firedeep. 3 grades: Common, Elite, Nightmare. Base stats (Common): 20 HP, 19 physical damage, 200 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 3, MaxImpactEndurance 4. 2 attacks, 0 combo chains. Highest damage: Attack2 at 200% ratio (380 base damage).

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.

status_effects_detail.name: Attacked
status_effects_detail.counter: Watch for the Attacked icon on your status bar.

status_effects_detail.name: Mounted
status_effects_detail.counter: Watch for the Mounted icon on your status bar.

status_effects_detail.name: Poison Pools
status_effects_detail.counter: Watch for the Poison Pools icon on your status bar.

strategies.title: Elemental Weaknesses: Ice, Light
strategies.description: Significant elemental weaknesses: Ice (-3000), Light (-2000). Negative reduction values mean incoming damage of that type is amplified.

strategies.title: Resists: Fire
strategies.description: Elemental resistances: Fire (+500). Positive reduction values reduce incoming damage of that type.

strategies.title: Projectile Reduction: 150
strategies.description: Has 150 ProjectileReductionMod, reducing physical projectile damage.

strategies.title: Highest Damage: Attack2 (200% ratio)
strategies.description: Attack2 deals 380 damage at base (200% ratio). This is the most dangerous attack to avoid.

elite_differences: ActionSpeed 0 → 100 in Elite — attacks animate faster
ActionSpeed 0 → 200 in Nightmare — attacks animate faster

ai_perception.damage_description: Reacts to damage from any direction.
